subject: [N5] 20 action items from 2025-10-27 external-lisa-noble
body:
Hi V,

I extracted 20 action items from your 2025-10-27 external-lisa-noble meeting (20251028-132902_Meetings).
Please review and reply with your approval:

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

**1. # B01: Detailed Recap**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 meeting
   📝 From meeting recap...

**2. ## Key Decisions and Agreements**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**3. **Panel Preparation Sync**: Lisa and Vrijen aligned on tomorrow's panel approach - focus on "getting into flow state, letting nerves settle, and just yapping" with strategic hot takes delivered thoughtfully given diverse stakeholder audience**
   📅 Tomorrow 10:00am | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**4. **Careerspan Partnership Exploration**: Lisa expressed strong interest in Careerspan's job distribution system for Colby students and alumni - particularly the ability to bypass handshake and provide filtered, matched opportunities**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**5. **Alumni Network Opportunity Identified**: Lisa highlighted that alumni job distribution may be even more valuable than undergrad placement - classes 2017-2022 are all pivoting, creating immediate demand for career transition support**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Networking | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**6. **Marvin Ventures Integration Shared**: Vrijen shared that McKinsey's unofficial alumni fund will start posting jobs through Careerspan - significant validation point that resonated with Lisa**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**7. ## Strategic Context**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**8. Career Services Pain Points:****
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**9. Lisa manages a challenging trifecta at Colby: (1) inbound job requests from employers she must qualify and vet manually, (2) handshake platform that both students and colleges hate, and (3) growing alumni population (2017-2022 cohorts) actively seeking career transitions in difficult market. The manual vetting workload is significant - she emphasized taking time to "vet them, have proper conversation, fall in love with them" for startups and non-traditional employers.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**10. Market Timing:****
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**11. The conversation revealed acute hiring market dysfunction from both sides. Founders aren't even looking at inbound applications anymore - they post for legal reasons but exclusively hire through warm referrals with dramatically raised bars. Meanwhile, top MBA graduates from Columbia are still unemployed months after graduation (first time Lisa has seen this), and Bain summer analysts aren't getting return offers. AI is being used as cover for layoffs more than genuine transformation.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Personnel | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**12. Partnership Value Proposition:****
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**13. Careerspan could solve three problems simultaneously: (1) automated employer vetting and job matching, (2) handshake replacement with better student experience, (3) alumni career transition support. Lisa was particularly interested in the ability to distribute jobs to matched students automatically and the filtering capability that lets employers describe ideal co-workers via voice message.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**14. Positioning Insight:****
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**15. Lisa's experience spans Bennington (creative, no resources, clothing-optional culture) and Bowdoin before Colby. She values practical solutions over bureaucracy, appreciates founder energy, and has deep networks (advisor to multiple startups including recruiting founders from Colby). The McKinsey casing guide Vrijen created (5-6k views, comprehensive) immediately impressed her - she recognizes quality execution.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Personnel | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**16. ## Critical Next Action**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**17. Owner:** Vrijen**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**18. Deliverable:** Send Lisa a Colby-specific signup code and implementation proposal showing how Careerspan would integrate with Davis Connects (Colby's career services system)**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Networking | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**19. Timeline:** Within 1 week of this meeting**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 meeting
   📝 From meeting recap...

**20. Purpose:** Enable Lisa to evaluate pilot feasibility with concrete implementation details, demonstrating value to both students and alumni while addressing her handshake pain points**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

**Reply with:**
• "approve all" → Push all to Akiflow
• "approve 1,20" → Push only #1 and #20
• "skip 2" → Don't create #2
• "edit 1: tomorrow 8am, 30m" → Modify then push

Or just reply "approved" and I'll push everything!

—Zo
